patterns.pattern: StateTree startup timing: OnPossess fires before SetStateTree during Super::BeginPlay()
patterns.solution: In AIC_Foreman BeginPlay: call Super::BeginPlay() first, then SetStateTree() + StartLogic() with IsRunning() guard. Also add StartLogic() retry in OnPossess with IsRunning() guard.

patterns.pattern: New C++ files with GENERATED_BODY() or Build.cs module changes require full editor restart
patterns.solution: Close UE editor → Build from Rider → Reopen editor. Live Coding only for changes to existing .cpp/.h files with no new GENERATED_BODY() macros.

patterns.pattern: SmartObject slot transform for navmesh targeting
patterns.solution: Use GetSlotTransform(RequestResult) → TOptional<FTransform> — not the actor location. The slot may be offset from the owning actor.
